goal: Find new strategy hypotheses without p-hacking or live execution.

allowed: Run exploratory sweeps on already-consumed historical data.
Promote only named hypotheses, not raw best rows.
Require unseen future holdout or paper-only forward validation before pre-live review.
Record failed hypotheses instead of silently retuning them.
Run market-regime-first diagnostics before creating another short-horizon stock-selection hypothesis.
Use 20d/60d horizon or event-data tracks when the short-horizon public-price signal search keeps failing.
Use sector/theme/event/fundamental data as a new question after pure OHLCV relative-strength also fails.
blocked: Infinite same-history optimization until the equity curve looks good.
Choosing best period/strategy/parameter after seeing locked test results and treating it as proof.
Live order promotion from ai-trader exploratory sweep output.
Ignoring KR tax, slippage, spread, limit-up/down, halts, or as-of universe selection.
Creating another 3d/5d public-price stock-selection hypothesis before checking whether market exposure is allowed.
Treating a same-history regime filter as approval; regime filters are diagnostics until frozen and forward-tested.
Running another pure OHLCV top-N cross-sectional stock-selection sweep without delisted-inclusive universe or new data source.

promotion_gates.max_single_window_dependency: No single year/rolling window may be the sole source of profit.

auto_discovery_loop.goal: Continuously run/fold strategy audits, keep multiple strategy families, and promote only forward-proven strategies to human pre-live review.
auto_discovery_loop.live_send_rule: The loop must not call order-live-send. It may only write a pre_live_review_candidate_not_live_order; live send still requires candidate file approval, green pre-live gates, exact fingerprint confirmation, and live env flags in a separate command.

research_pivot_2026_06_25.finding: Repeated public price/volume short-horizon stock-selection hypotheses failed; first ask whether the KOSDAQ regime permits long exposure at all.
research_pivot_2026_06_25.blocked_next_track: unbounded 3d/5d stock-selection search on the same historical OHLCV data
research_pivot_2026_06_25.latest_regime_exposure_gate_finding: Same-history KOSDAQ-only exposure gates did not beat always-long in locked-test daily equity; avoid_weak_downtrend_only slightly improved H20 forward average but still underperformed always-long equity after switch costs.
research_pivot_2026_06_25.next_concrete_track: Stop pure public OHLCV stock-selection variants; move to sector/theme/event/fundamental data, or build a delisted-inclusive universe before further cross-sectional research.
research_pivot_2026_06_25.latest_relative_strength_finding: H60 relative-strength top-20 monthly baskets failed both H20 and H60 locked-test excess vs eligible universe and KOSDAQ; top-N selection was worse than broad baselines.
research_pivot_2026_06_25.latest_event_liquidity_finding: News DB was deduped and default collection moved from generic price queries to catalyst queries. Current event audit: 83 news rows, 44 mapped events, 2 evaluable signals, 0 pending future signals. Still fail-closed because sample breadth is 1 symbol and locked-test event return/excess are negative.
